expectations.text: Runs pnpm sync or git diff to see what changed in upstream
expectations.evidence: Step 2: `pnpm sync skills/coding-standards` is explicitly shown. Also recommends reading upstream SKILL.md to understand what changed.

expectations.text: Explicitly applies cross-reference scan to the diff output (not just generic upgrade)
expectations.evidence: No grep scan performed. Response closes with: 'The old skill does not include a systematic step for checking whether new cross-references appeared... The operator would need to manually eyeball the diff for any new skill/agent mentions.'

expectations.text: Describes what action to take if new cross-references ARE found in the diff
expectations.evidence: Old skill only says 'note [internal dependencies]; they go in dependencies.required or dependencies.optional' — no recursive pick workflow, no decision matrix, no concrete steps. Response acknowledges: 'no grep scan, no decision matrix, and no recursive pick workflow.'

expectations.text: Describes what action to take if NO new cross-references are found
expectations.evidence: No guidance given for the no-new-refs case. Old skill only describes the merge/bump-commit flow, not a dependency confirmation step.
